metadata.description: codeweb — the living map of your codebase. Deterministic call/import graph, 27 read-only MCP tools, ambient pre/post-edit hooks, and a self-contained interactive report.

plugins.name: codeweb
plugins.description: Map any repo in seconds: /codeweb builds the graph; hooks brief every session and impact-check every edit; 27 deterministic MCP tools answer impact, callers, duplication, dead code, and risk before the agent writes.
